# OpenClaw Email Skill

OpenClaw Email Skill is a skill package for open, inspectable email campaign operations for agents.

Install:

```bash
npx skills add openclawemailskill
```

## Primary agent resources

- Markdown index: https://openclawemailskill.com/index.md
- Skill page: https://openclawemailskill.com/skill/index.md
- Raw SKILL.md: https://openclawemailskill.com/skills/openclawemailskill/SKILL.md
- Skill discovery JSON: https://openclawemailskill.com/.well-known/skills/index.json

## Articles

- How to Build an Agent-Ready OpenClaw Email Strategy: https://openclawemailskill.com/articles/agent-ready-email-strategy/index.md
- The Practical OpenClaw Email Operations Playbook for AI Agents: https://openclawemailskill.com/articles/email-operations-playbook/index.md
- OpenClaw Email Skill Audit Checklist: From Prompt to Production: https://openclawemailskill.com/articles/email-skill-audit-checklist/index.md
